chapter_title.en: Chapter on Retaliation (qisas) and the Amount of Blood Money (diyyah)

text: 5202 - وَ سَمِعَ كُلَيْبُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: "مَنْ قَتَلَ فِي شَهْرٍ حَرَامٍ فَعَلَيْهِ دِيَةٌ وَ ثُلُثٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5202 - Kulayb ibn Muawiyah heard Abu Abdullah Imam Al-Sadiq (as) say:
"Whoever kills during a sacred month (haram month) is liable for the full blood money (diyyah) plus one-third."
